---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new lesson skill before (or instead of) opening a PR
title: "skill: <short name>"
labels: skill
---

## The pedagogy

What kind of lesson does this skill build, and for whom? What does it do
that `lingochunk-lesson` (or another existing skill) does not?

## The shape

Which lesson.v1 blocks would it compose, roughly in what order? (See the
block table in docs/skill-authoring.md - skills compose the existing block
vocabulary; if you need a block that does not exist, file a
"new block type" issue instead.)

## Options

What would it ask the user to settle first (level, time range, focus, ...)?

## Status

- [ ] Idea only
- [ ] Drafted locally
- [ ] Tested live against my own account (working `app_url`)
